name: foresight-engine
description: Strategic foresight engine using IFTF methodology. Two modes: Soft Predict (Claude-native, instant — just ask a future question) and Hard Predict (deterministic Python chain, auditable — say 'run hard predict: ...'). Drivers, cross-impact, backcasting, four-scenario reports. Try: Will India become the global AI leader by 2050? Will OpenAI or Anthropic win by 2030?
